allow:
Bash(git add lib/prompts/system.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: stop LLM doubling LaTeX+text, fix geometry angle notation and arrowDirection

Three prompt fixes for the broken circle theorem output:

1. Anti-doubling rule: explicitly forbid writing an expression in both
   $LaTeX$ form AND plain text in the same field \(was causing phantom
   text like "C\\nD\\nCD is a tangent"\)

2. Geometry LaTeX guide: add \\angle, \\triangle, \\therefore etc. notation
   rules so latexBefore/latexAfter use proper angle commands instead of
   plain "OAB = 3x"

3. arrowDirection rules: clarify "both_sides" is ONLY for algebraic
   operations applied to both sides of an equation — geometry theorem
   steps must use "down" or "simplify"

4. Replace Pythagoras geometry example with a circle-theorem \(tangent +
   alternate segment theorem\) example that demonstrates correct angle
   notation and arrowDirections throughout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add lib/skills.ts lib/prompts/system.ts app/api/chat/route.ts components/ChatInterface.tsx components/SkillMap.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: follow-up questions, hint mode, and skill tracking

Follow-up questions:
- detectFollowUp\(\) in route.ts: detects clarification questions by keyword pattern
- Fast path skips CAS/SymPy/critic for follow-ups — 3x faster response
- buildFollowUpPrompt\(\) returns lightweight system prompt for conversational replies \(1-2 text blocks\)

Hint mode:
- "Solve it / Hint only" toggle in both HeroLanding and ChatInputBar
- Appends HINT MODE directive to the user message — LLM guides instead of reveals
- State lives in ChatInterface, passed via props

Skill tracking:
- /lib/skills.ts: pure localStorage utility \(recordSkillAttempt, getSkillData, getMastery\)
- Automatically records topic after every solver_done event
- Mastery levels: unseen → learning \(1-2\) → practiced \(3-4\) → mastered \(5+\)
- SkillMap.tsx: modal overlay showing all maths topics colored by mastery
- Tapping a topic pre-fills the chat with a practice request
- "My progress" button in HeroLanding opens the skill map

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
